title: Kafka Connect
description: Industry-standard monitoring dashboard for Kafka Connect workers in kafka-prod-ns (Strimzi-managed, AKS cluster: divyam-prod-k8s-cluster). Covers connector consumer/producer JMX metrics, JVM health, Kubernetes resource utilization, and Strimzi operator reconciliation health.

definition.content:
**Kafka Connect Health - kafka-prod-ns**

Key degradation signals to watch:
- **Consumer throughput drops** -> source-side issues or rebalancing
- **Producer errors/retries rising** -> sink connectivity or backpressure
- **High JVM heap** -> memory pressure, risk of OOM
- **Container restarts** -> OOM kills or liveness probe failures
- **CPU throttling** -> under-provisioned resources
- **Strimzi reconciliation failures** -> operator management issues

definition.title: JVM GC Memory Pools (Old Gen / Eden / Survivor)
CPU: Usage vs Limits vs Requests
Memory: Working Set vs Limits vs Requests
Reconciliation Success vs Total vs Locked
